title: OIDC CI/CD trust-condition conformance vector suite
description: A file of test vectors, each answering: does subject S satisfy trust condition C, and is C safe?

suite.description: Stable identifier for this suite file, e.g. 'github-aws'.

version.description: Suite revision, bumped when vectors change.

id.description: Kebab-case, unique across the whole corpus.

issuer.description: Which CI system minted the subject.

subject.description: A concrete OIDC token subject claim value (no wildcards).

expect.description: Whether the subject satisfies the condition.

status.description: 'documented' = derived from cited docs; 'observed' = confirmed against a real issuer/cloud.

sources.description: Primary-source URLs. Every vector is cited; none ship on vibes.

consumer.description: Which cloud consumer's matching semantics apply.

pattern.description: The admin-written trust rule (may contain wildcards, per consumer).

grade.description: Human-authored safety grade for the condition; never computed by the matcher.

patterns.description: Catalog tags for the over-permission pattern(s), e.g. 'wildcard-repo'.
